title: Good CONCURRENTLY index build — correct non-blocking pattern outside transaction
migration_snippet:
-- V7__add_search_index.sql
-- flyway:executeInTransaction=false
SET statement_timeout = '0';  -- CONCURRENTLY can take time, don't timeout
SET lock_timeout = '10s';     -- but don't wait forever for initial lock
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS idx_orders_search ON orders USING gin (search_vector);
expected_feedback: No violations. Correct CONCURRENTLY usage: (1) flyway directive to run outside transaction, (2) statement_timeout disabled for long-running build, (3) lock_timeout set for initial lock acquisition, (4) IF NOT EXISTS for idempotency, (5) appropriate GIN index type for tsvector.
